title: [export-verilog] I'm getting an error exporting sv.case generated by previous transformation in CIRCT
body:
```
arith_to_verilog.mlir:27:7: error: 'sv.case' op region #3 ('caseRegions') failed to verify constraint: region with 1 blocks
      sv.case %state_reg : !hw.typealias<@fsm_enum_typedecls::@control_sum_state_t, !hw.enum<fsm_entry, fsm_exit, seq_0_ret_assign_0>>
      ^
arith_to_verilog.mlir:27:7: note: see current operation: 
"sv.case"(%11) ({
  "sv.bpassign"(%9, %12) : (!hw.inout<typealias<@fsm_enum_typedecls::@control_sum_state_t, !hw.enum<fsm_entry, fsm_exit, seq_0_ret_assign_0>>>, !hw.typealias<@fsm_enum_typedecls::@control_sum_state_t, !hw.enum<fsm_entry, fsm_exit, seq_0_ret_assign_0>>) -> ()
  "sv.bpassign"(%14, %arg2) : (!hw.inout<i1>, i1) -> ()
```
I'm using the simple_arith.mlir example with the following commands
```
circt-opt simple_arith.mlir \
    --lower-scf-to-calyx -canonicalize \
    --calyx-remove-comb-groups --canonicalize > calyx.mlir
circt-opt calyx.mlir --lower-calyx-to-fsm --canonicalize \
    --materialize-calyx-to-fsm --canonicalize \
    --calyx-remove-groups-fsm --canonicalize \
    --lower-calyx-to-hw --canonicalize \
    --convert-fsm-to-sv > arith_to_verilog.mlir
     
circt-opt arith_to_verilog.mlir -export-verilog
```
